texto: You don't create or write to be successful
autor: you don't create or paint to be famous or to increase your wealth. You do all of these things because your soul is calling you to do them.
explicacao: Citação de you don't create or paint to be famous or to increase your wealth. You do all of these things because your soul is calling you to do them. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You don't create or write to be successful” articula reflexao, kelly-martin, create em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
